name: Black Forest Cheesecake Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and melted margarine, pressing the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the softened cream cheese and sugar until well blended.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Blend in the melted chocolate chips and almond extract.
6. Pour the batter over the crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 45 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and let it cool before removing the rim.
9. Chill completely.
10. Just before serving, top with cherry pie filling and whipped topping.
